creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ curl -sLI https://download.FreeBSD.org/ports/index/INDEX-1{2,3,4}.xz | grep Last-Mod
Last-Modified: Sun, 06 Aug 2023 06:06:42 GMT
Last-Modified: Sun, 06 Aug 2023 06:14:09 GMT
Last-Modified: Sun, 06 Aug 2023 03:30:24 GMT

INDEX-13 has switched my "pkg version -IvL=" from "succeeds index" on some ports to "needs updating" on others.

Thank you!
